prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger** (ball-bearing, 62mm inducer) paired with a **custom BorgWarner EFR 7670 intercooler** (1200hp-capable core) for the **5.0L AJ-V8 Gen III SC (510PS) engine (code: AJ133S)**, increasing boost to 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) with a **Motec M150 ECU** managing a **custom 1000cc ID1000 fuel injector** setup and **Bosch Motorsport 0280158888 high-flow fuel pumps** for sustained 750whp on E85.

Install a **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** with a **custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipe** (ceramic-coated) and a **Milltek Sport 304 stainless steel 76mm cat-back exhaust** (resonated, valved) to optimize spool and reduce backpressure, while integrating a **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** for precise turbo management.

Replace the stock **ZF 8HP70 8-speed automatic transmission** with a **ZF 8HP95X (8-speed high-performance variant)** reinforced with a **Peloquin LSD differential (40% lock)** and a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc clutch (2600lb torque capacity)** for the **AJ133S**, paired with a **Penske 8760 adjustable coilover suspension** (3-way damping, 24-position rebound) and **Eibach ERS race springs (800lb/in front, 600lb/in rear)** for track-ready handling.
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (XJ-specific)** with **custom carbon fiber fender flares (30mm extended front, 40mm rear)** and **Rocket Bunny-style side skirts**, paired with a **Vorsteiner V-FF107 carbon fiber front splitter** and **custom 3D-printed rear diffuser** (integrated dual 100mm exhaust cutouts) for aggressive aero balance.

Install **OEM+ LED headlight assemblies (Jaguar XE SV Project 8-spec)** with **Lux H8 V4 bulbs (5500K, 4000lm)** and **custom Morimoto XB35 LED fog lights**, complemented by **VMR V710 20x9.5 ET25 (front) and 20x11 ET35 (rear) forged wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 305/25/20 rear)** for a staggered stance.

Apply a **full Respray in Jaguar ‘Ultra Blue’ (code: 8A8A)** with **3M Matte Clear Coat (101145)** and **custom gold pinstriping (1mm width)** along the beltline, paired with **debadged rear (Jaguar script removed)** and **custom ‘XJ SS’ laser-etched carbon fiber door sills** (illuminated, RGB backlit).
